news_items.title: World Cup 2026: England v Mexico latest - team news, predictions & weather update - BBC Sport
news_items.text:
World Cup 2026: England v Mexico latest - team news, predictions & weather update - BBC Sport

Live Reporting

- Scores
- Tables
- Watch & listen

## Summary

Fifa World Cup 2026: England take on Mexico in the last 16 at 01:00 BST - will you stay up or catch up?

Read about how you can watch and follow the game live or when you wake up with a full match replay at 07:10 BST on Monday - don't forget to turn notifications off to avoid spoilers

Reece James is a doubt but Jarell Quansah 'is fully available' and Declan Rice is likely to be fit for the game

England boss Thomas Tuchel says they had 'no issues' after arriving at their hotel in Mexico City

England are going to have to adjust their style, according to the energy-sapping conditions at altitude, says the BBC's Sami Mokbel

Could thunderstorms delay the start of the game?

Former England forward Chris Sutton thinks England will win 2-1- make your prediction by using our World Cup predictor

## Send us your views

Get involved

## Live Reporting

Written by Flora Snelson, Jude Winter & Craig Nelson

Show

Most recentMost popular

You heard it from Jordan Henderson, the England players are ready.

But are you?

However you plan

news_items.title: Mexico vs England at World Cup 2026: TV channel, how to watch in UK, kick-off time, live stream, referee, predicted line-ups - ESPN
news_items.author: Anirudh Menon
news_items.text:
Mexico vs England at World Cup 2026: TV channel, how to watch in UK, kick-off time, live stream, referee, predicted line-ups - ESPN

Skip to main content Skip to navigation

England take on co-hosts Mexico in what promises to be an absolute cracker of a World Cup round of 16 tie. The two sides have taken contrasting routes to get here: Mexico easing through qualifying to the knockouts with three wins in three and then comfortably holding of Ecuador for a 2-0 win at the Azteca Stadium in the round of 32.

England, meanwhile, had a couple of wins and a dull draw in the group stages before struggling for large parts of their round of 32 tie vs Congo DR. After trailing 0-1 till the 74th minute, two moments of magic from captain Harry Kane ensured they wouldn't be on an early flight home. Now, facing them is the challenge of Mexico at the Azteca.

Here's everything you need to know about Wednesday's game:

## How to watch:

The match will be available on BBC One in the UK, Fox Sports in the U.S., Zee5 in India and SBS in Australia. You can also follow ESPN's live updates.

## Key Details:

Date, kick-off time*: U.S. ET: 8 p.m. Sunday, July 5 UK BST: 1 a.m. Monday, July 6 India IST: 5:30

## Summary

Fifa World Cup 2026: England take on Mexico in the last 16 at 01:00 BST - will you stay up or catch up?

Read about how you can watch and follow the game live or when you wake up with a full match replay at 07:10 BST on Monday - don't forget to turn notifications off to avoid spoilers

Reece James is a doubt but Jarell Quansah 'is fully available' and Declan Rice is likely to be fit for the game

England boss Thomas Tuchel says they had 'no issues' after arriving at their hotel in Mexico City

England are going to have to adjust their style, according to the energy-sapping conditions at altitude, says the BBC's Sami Mokbel

Could thunderstorms delay the start of the game?

Former England forward Chris Sutton thinks England will win 2-1- make your prediction by using our World Cup predictor

{"title": "Mexico vs England at World Cup 2026: TV channel, how to watch in UK, kick-off time, live stream, referee, predicted line-ups - ESPN", "url": "https://www.espn.com/soccer/story/_/id/49260482/mexico-vs-england-fifa-world-cup-2026-tv-channel-how-watch-kick-live-stream-injury-predicted-line-ups", "publishedDate": "2026-07-03T23:46:00.000Z", "author": "Anirudh Menon", "text": "Mexico vs England at World Cup 2026: TV channel, how to watch in UK, kick-off time, live stream, referee, predicted line-ups - ESPN

Skip to main content Skip to navigation

England take on co-hosts Mexico in what promises to be an absolute cracker of a World Cup round of 16 tie. The two sides have taken contrasting routes to get here: Mexico easing through qualifying to the knockouts with three wins in three and then comfortably holding of Ecuador for a 2-0 win at the Azteca Stadium in the round of 32.

England, meanwhile, had a couple of wins and a dull draw in the group stages before struggling for large parts of their round of 32 tie vs Congo DR. After trailing 0-1 till the 74th minute, two moments of magic from captain Harry Kane ensured they wouldn't be on an early flight home. Now, facing them is the challenge of Mexico at the Azteca.

Here's everything you need to know about Wednesday's game:

## How to watch:

The match will be available on BBC One in the UK, Fox Sports in the U.S., Zee5 in India and SBS in Australia. You can also follow ESPN's live updates.

## Key Details:

Date, kick-off time*: U.S. ET: 8 p.m. Sunday, July 5 UK BST: 1 a.m. Monday, July 6 India IST: 5:30"}
